recommendations.title: Collision
recommendations.overview: Deceit and betrayal rise to the surface after newlyweds survive a deadly car accident in the Moroccan desert.

recommendations.title: Mine
recommendations.overview: After a failed assassination attempt, a soldier finds himself stranded in the desert. Exposed to the elements, he must survive the dangers of the desert and battle the psychological and physical toll of the treacherous conditions.

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Quest for Fire
recommendations.overview: In the prehistoric world, a Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge to start a new fire, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest for more. With the tribe's future at stake, th

recommendations.title: 10,000 BC
recommendations.overview: A prehistoric epic that follows a young mammoth hunter's journey through uncharted territory to secure the future of his tribe.

recommendations.title: Mutiny on the Bounty
recommendations.overview: Fletcher Christian successfully leads a revolt against the ruthless Captain Bligh on the HMS Bounty. However, Bligh returns one year later, hell bent on revenge.

recommendations.title: Togo
recommendations.overview: The untold true story set in the winter of 1925 that takes you across the treacherous terrain of the Alaskan tundra for an exhilarating and uplifting adventure that will test the strength, courage and determination of one man, Leonhard Seppala, and h

recommendations.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A group of rambunctious toddlers travel a trip to Paris. As they journey from the Eiffel Tower to Notre Dame, they learn new lessons about trust, loyalty and love.

recommendations.title: Robin Hood
recommendations.overview: A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander mount an audacious revolt against the corrupt English crown.

recommendations.title: Young Black Stallion
recommendations.overview: When courageous young Neera becomes separated from her family in the desert, she chances upon a wild colt. Together they find friendship, trust, and their way back home only to discover her family is about to lose everything!
